warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
Warm Up
10 Scap Push Ups
10 scap Pull ups
5 Hindu Push Ups
10m bear Crawls
10 x Inch Worms
10 Cossack Squats

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
EMOM x 8 mins
Min 1 : 2 Wall walks or 6m HSW
Min 2: 3 BMU & 10 Reverse Lunges @ 22.5/15

gymnastics:
EMOM x 4 (0:00)
12 Hollow Rocks
EMOM X 4
Beat Swing x 10
- think Knuckles over the bar
Bigger Beat swing - Push down to rise up!!
Floor Arch Turn Over
Low bar transition from box
- False grip + Long arms. - move box away to make it harder
Banded BMU OR BMU
EMOM X 2 20s handstand hold
EMOM X 2 180 deg. Conan Walk (on box) x 2
EMOM X 2 5-10 Shoulder taps (or wall walk)
Tripod Handstand Hold
EMOM X 2 Spotted Freestanding Handstand Hold
EMOM X 2 Spotted handstand walk with PVC

hypertrophy.reasoning: Today taxes shoulders, arms, and hip flexors heavily; build posterior chain and rotational stability without competing for recovery.
